_instructions: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your details. Never commit config.json to git.
_xrayNote: Get Client ID + Secret from: Jira → Apps → Xray → Settings → API Keys → Generate
_issueTypeNote: Must match exactly — check your Jira project settings (usually 'Test' for Xray)
_tokenNote: Get your Jira API token from: https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens
